opportunity.title: Jeriko – an AI agent that runs directly inside your OS
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: Running agents at OS level creates unique sandboxing challenges since you're competing with privileged system processes for kernel hooks. The real gotcha is context persistence—agents need to maintain state across process restarts without bloating memory, which typically requires careful IPC design between agent space and system services.
actions.reasoning: Direct hands-on experience building AI agent systems with cognitive architectures and tool orchestration that integrate with OS-level operations
